parameters.query:
SELECT 
  from_currency,
  to_currency,
  rate_type, -- <--- ESTO ES INDISPENSABLE
  TO_CHAR(MAX(rate_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') as last_db_date
FROM 
  forex.rate 
WHERE 
  provider_id = 'banxico'
GROUP BY 
  from_currency,
  to_currency,
  rate_type;

SELECT 
  from_currency,
  to_currency,
  rate_type, -- <--- ESTO ES INDISPENSABLE
  TO_CHAR(MAX(rate_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') as last_db_date
FROM 
  forex.rate 
WHERE 
  provider_id = 'fred'
GROUP BY 
  from_currency,
  to_currency,
  rate_type;
